name: Craft3
description_short: Craft3 is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization providing financial assistance and counseling services. NMLS-regulated lender committed to equal opportunity lending.
description_long: Craft3 operates as a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization (EIN 91-1662698) with NMLS licensing (#390159), positioning itself within the community development finance sector. The organization maintains a web presence at craft3.org and emphasizes accessibility and regulatory compliance in its operations. The fragmented website content available suggests Craft3 offers multiple financial services typical of nonprofit community development financial institutions (CDFIs). Based on their nonprofit status, NMLS licensing, and footer references to loan products, Craft3 likely provides credit-building services, financial counseling, and potentially small dollar lending to underserved populations. Their emphasis on equal opportunity lending and employer policies indicates a mission-driven approach to financial inclusion. The website's login functionality and subscription offerings suggest digital platforms for member engagement and educational content distribution. As a 501(c)(3), all donations to Craft3 are tax-deductible, reinforcing their charitable mission. The organization maintains commitment to accessibility standards and appears to serve as a resource for financial education and assistance.
pros: Equal opportunity lender and employer policy—commitment to financial inclusion
Accessible website design with documented accessibility standards
Appears to offer member login and online account access
Provides financial education content via newsletter subscription
Compliance with NMLS Consumer Access requirements and Title VI regulations
cons: Website content is incomplete/broken—difficult to verify specific services offered
Limited publicly available information about loan terms, rates, or eligibility requirements
No clear service descriptions or product details accessible on current website
Geographic service area not specified in available content
Specific counseling services and credit-building offerings unclear from website
best_for: Individuals seeking nonprofit credit counseling from a mission-driven lender
Underserved populations seeking fair lending from a CDFI
Consumers wanting to support a tax-deductible nonprofit while accessing financial services
diagnosis: Craft3 is best for consumers seeking financial services from a legitimate, regulated 501(c)(3) nonprofit committed to fair lending practices. Critical caveat: The website's incomplete content makes it impossible to verify specific services, rates, terms, or geographic availability—prospective users should contact Craft3 directly or request detailed service information before applying.
services: Loan products (specific types unclear from available content)
Member login and online account access
